## BooleanFilter interface

A boolean filter used in a [FacetFilter](./x-types.facetfilter.md)<!-- -->, which status can be selected or not and it may contains the total results number that the filter should return.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export interface BooleanFilter extends FacetFilter 
```
<b>Extends:</b> [FacetFilter](./x-types.facetfilter.md)

## Remarks

It is like an "abstract" interface because it is not going to be implemented but it is extended by other interfaces. There will never be an object with this type.

## Properties

|  Property | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  [label](./x-types.booleanfilter.label.md) | string | Text to render the filter label. |
|  [modelName](./x-types.booleanfilter.modelname.md) | [BooleanFilterModelName](./x-types.booleanfiltermodelname.md) | Type to narrow [ModelNameType](./x-types.modelnametype.md) from the extended Filter for the known subtypes. |
|  [totalResults?](./x-types.booleanfilter.totalresults.md) | number | <i>(Optional)</i> Amount of matching results. |
